scores.notes: Code is well-structured and idiomatic. Minor issue: _on_config_changed calls _on_pebble_ready with wrong event type (type: ignore masks it). CharmConfig uses ops.pebble.Layer constructor with a dict which is valid. Uses relation.data.get(relation.app) instead of relation.data[relation.app] which is a safe variation. All three required features (config command, DB env vars, HTTP health check) are present. No fabricated APIs.
